name: VaultSparkStudios.github.io
currentFocus: Session 85 closed out: 8 items shipped at quality bar across two `/go` rounds on a founder-directed brief — reframe /studio-pulse/ as an immersive user-facing experience and incorporate the full 27-initiative portfolio across the site without revealing any proprietary info. Round 1: /studio-pulse/ rebuilt as "The Forge Window" (cinematic breathing hero, portfolio heartbeat strip, current-focus band, Living Worlds + Tools grids with heat bars, 12-tile Sealed Vault sigil grid, signal strip, coming-next teasers; killed the Now/Next/Shipped founder kanban + IGNIS tile + sessions/edge-functions counters + All-Systems-Green checklist). Catalog pipeline rewritten to source from studio-hub/src/data/studioRegistry.js with self-hosted SPARKED override — 15 items listed vs prior 8. Portfolio scale block added to public-intelligence.json (total:27, publicListed:15, sealedCount:12, sparked:4, forge:9, vaulted:2). Homepage pulse teaser rewritten around "27 initiatives. One vault. One live window." Round 2: reusable assets/sealed-vault-row.js component with scoped injected CSS + context-aware copy + CSP-clean rendering; mounted on /games/ + /projects/ hubs; scripts/propagate-nav.mjs footer legend extended with fourth SEALED chip + site-wide 27-initiative signal propagated across 79 HTML files. Two HAR items unchanged: Ask IGNIS (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) + 3-item edge-gate/CSP-nonce/rate-limit bundle (CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN).
nextMilestone: Watch first post-push Lighthouse + playwright-axe runs — S85 rebuilt the Pulse page with large animated gradients + pulsing sigil grid and propagated footer changes across 79 files; verify the tightened S82/S83 budgets still hold. Then next pickups: strip dead intel-* references from assets/home-intelligence.js (setText/renderList calls are now defensive no-ops because IDs are gone from the live homepage); founder-decision on renaming the nav label "Studio Pulse" → "Forge Window" (URL stays /studio-pulse/ for SEO); ship category-aware send-push edge function + push_preferences column to close the second half of S80 Tier 4 push item. CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN remains the highest-leverage single founder action (unlocks 3 Tier 1 infra items).
blockers: CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN missing — blocks edge-gating private portals, CSP nonce migration, and rate-limit/CSRF on forms (3 S80 Tier 1 infrastructure items)
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY missing in Supabase edge-function secrets — blocks Ask IGNIS concierge and future AI surfaces
Annual Stripe plan keys still do not exist, so annual checkout remains an honest preview only
